description_long: This is a sleek, metallic military jet aircraft with a pointed nose cone, swept-back wings, and a single vertical tail fin. The fuselage is streamlined and features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy. The wings are low-mounted and swept, equipped with multiple hardpoints carrying missiles or fuel tanks. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, giving it a classic fighter jet silhouette. The landing gear is visible and appears to be of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The aircraft is primarily silver-gray with some colored markings on the tail.
description: A silver-gray military jet with swept-back wings, a pointed nose, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. It features visible landing gear and external stores under the wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose cone, forward cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with visible underwing stores.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, swept wings, external stores, and colored markings on the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the jet exhaust at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aircraft's profile, wing configuration, and external stores.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles; equipped with multiple underwing hardpoints.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine integrated within the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, all appearing retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
